data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with Strategy (MSTR) down 1.94%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US. Strategy (MSTR) fell 1.94%, MARA Holdings (MARA) fell 1.43%, Sharplink Gaming (SBET) fell 0.2%, BitMine (BMNR) rose 1.02%, and DeFi Development Corp (DFDV) fell 3.3%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: USDC Treasury Reduces Circulating Supply with Token Burn
data.description: The USDC Treasury has conducted a significant token burn, destroying 50 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. According to NS3.AI, this action decreases the circulating supply of USDC stablecoins. Token burns are often indicative of treasury management strategies or adjustments in the stablecoin supply.

data.title: A whale's revolving loan purchase of XVS resulted in the liquidation of 287,000 units, leading to a loss of $1.09 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, the price of XVS fell 40% in one day, from $5.3 to $3.1. A certain whale (0x1c2...f5df) borrowed 1.4 million USDT through Venus to pledge XVS and continued to buy, accumulating 532,000 XVS worth $2.81 million. Affected by the price drop, this whale had 287,000 XVS liquidated in the flash crash one hour ago to repay 930,000 USDT at a liquidation price of $3.23, currently incurring a loss of $1.09 million. The address's current position health ratio is 1.07; if XVS continues to fall below $3.2, its position will face further liquidation.

data.title: MetaPlanet to Raise $137 Million for Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description: MetaPlanet (MTPLF) is set to raise $137 million through a new stock issuance and warrants. According to Odaily, the funds will be used to purchase additional Bitcoin. This move aligns with the company's strategy to expand its cryptocurrency holdings.

data.title: Guizhou Moutai Denies Involvement in SpaceX IPO Funding
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Guizhou Moutai has refuted claims that it participated in the Series A funding round for SpaceX's initial public offering. According to a report by Shanghai Securities News, rumors circulated in the market suggesting that Guizhou Moutai confirmed its involvement in the SpaceX IPO funding. However, representatives from Guizhou Moutai have clarified that this information is false.

data.title: Whale accumulated nearly $7M XAUT from Bybit
data.description:
Bybit sent out several XAUT transactions to a single whale, now sitting on a tokenized gold portfolio of nearly $7M.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whale-accumulated-nearly-7m-xaut-from-bybit/

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation and Polkadot-related organizations participated in the Nanyang Technological University Blockchain Master's Capstone Showcase Day.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation, Polkadot developer relations partners PaperMoon, 0G, SNZ, and other blockchain-related organizations were recently invited to participate in the Nanyang Technological University (NTU) Capstone Project Showcase Day. This project, based on NTU's Master of Science in Blockchain (MSBT) program, requires students to collaborate with companies or institutions over 3–6 months to conduct practical projects focusing on real-world blockchain applications or solutions.

data.title: Blockchain Institutions Participate in NTU Capstone Project Showcase
data.description: Several blockchain-related organizations, including the Ethereum Foundation, Polkadot developer relations partner PaperMoon, 0G, and SNZ, recently attended the Capstone Project Showcase at Nanyang Technological University (NTU). According to Odaily, this event is part of NTU's Master of Science in Blockchain program, which requires students to collaborate with companies or institutions over a period of 3 to 6 months. The collaboration focuses on practical projects involving real-world blockchain applications or solutions.

data.title: Gold and Silver Prices Surge as Lunar New Year Approaches
data.description: Crypto KOL Bitwu.ETH posted on X about the significant rise in gold and silver prices today. As the Lunar New Year approaches, Bitwu.ETH decided to use his savings to purchase a gold bracelet for his wife. His wife praised his thoughtful choice, noting the bracelet's unique elegance. However, Bitwu.ETH expressed a sense of unease about the situation.

data.title: Market Analysis: The market is selling off the dollar, not the US dollar.
data.description: Market analyst Jeremy Boulton stated that traders are selling the dollar, but not the US itself; US Treasuries remain stable, while the stock market has surged to record highs. The stability of the bond market indicates that the market has little, or no, substantial concern about the economy. From this perspective, a weaker dollar is good news for the Trump administration, stimulating the US economy, supporting the stock market, and lowering export prices amid the trade war. The dollar has only given back a small portion of the gains accumulated between 2011 and January 2025 (the beginning of the trade war). The market's willingness to sell the dollar helps alleviate the problems caused by its previous strength. That round of appreciation was excessive, technically overbought, and contributed to a significant widening of the current account deficit. In the first three quarters of 2025, the US current account deficit narrowed from $450 billion to $226 billion. If the dollar weakens further, the deficit may continue to shrink. Overall, although the dollar has given back some of its strength, it is of little concern to the US government. (Jinshi)

data.title: USDC Treasury Destroys 50 Million USDC on Ethereum Network
data.description: Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury destroyed 50 million USDC on the Ethereum network today. According to Odaily, this significant transaction was detected and monitored, highlighting ongoing activities within the cryptocurrency space. The destruction of USDC tokens is part of regular operations to manage the supply and demand dynamics of the stablecoin. Such actions are often undertaken to maintain the stability and value of USDC in the market.

data.title: DGrid AI Launches Anonymous AI Model Competition Platform
data.description:
DGrid AI has introduced the DGrid AI Arena, a decentralized platform for anonymous AI model competitions. According to Foresight News, this community-driven initiative aims to evaluate and define the true quality of AI models through a fair and transparent 'blind test' method. In the AI Arena, users are presented with responses from two anonymous models, labeled as 'Model A' and 'Model B,' to the same question. Without knowing the models' identities, which could be GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, or others, users vote for the better answer. The models' names are revealed only after the voting concludes.

The DGrid AI Arena consists of three main components: AI Battle, a points system, and a rewards section. Users can earn points by completing daily AI model voting tasks and inviting new users. These points can be directly exchanged for USDT rewards, and participants can also compete in a weekly leaderboard for a share of the prize pool.

data.title: Guotou Silver LOF Fund Announces Suspension Starting January 2026
data.description: Guotou Silver LOF Fund has announced a suspension of trading starting January 30, 2026. According to PANews, the fund will halt trading from market open to close on this date. If the secondary market trading price premium does not effectively decrease by February 2, 2026, the fund reserves the right to apply for an intraday temporary suspension or extend the suspension period to warn of market risks. Further details will be provided in subsequent announcements.

data.title: Bitcoin's Performance Diverges from Dollar Index Trends
data.description:
On January 29, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a 10% decline over the past year, yet Bitcoin did not rise as it typically does when the dollar weakens, instead falling by 13% during the same period. According to BlockBeats, strategists from JPMorgan Private Bank suggest that the current dollar weakness is driven by short-term capital flows and market sentiment rather than changes in growth or monetary policy expectations. Despite favorable interest rate differentials for the dollar since the beginning of the year, Bitcoin has not acted as a typical hedge against dollar fluctuations.

JPMorgan analysts argue that the market does not perceive the current dollar decline as a lasting macroeconomic shift, leading Bitcoin to be viewed more as a liquidity-sensitive risk asset rather than a reliable store of value. In contrast, gold and emerging market assets have become more direct beneficiaries of dollar diversification.

data.title: OSL Group Announces $200 Million Equity Financing
data.description: OSL Group (863.HK), a stablecoin trading and payment platform, announced today a US$200 million (approximately HK$1.56 billion) equity financing round to deepen its strategic layout in stablecoin trading and payment. According to the plan, the funds raised will be used for strategic acquisitions, expanding its global payment and stablecoin business, product and technology infrastructure development, and daily operations. OSL Group CFO Ivan Wong stated, “OSL Group’s strategic layout in the stablecoin trading and payment sector has received full market recognition and widespread support. This financing will allow the company to introduce more like-minded strategic and long-term investors, enabling it to not only timely acquire high-quality licensed trading and payment companies globally, but also expand its shareholder base and capital size, laying a solid first-mover advantage for the company's compliance-based globalization strategy.”

data.title: OpenAI is exploring the development of biometric-based social networks.
data.description: OpenAI is in the early stages of exploring the development of a social network focused on real users. Discussions involve using tools such as Apple Face ID and Worldwide's Orb iris scanner for biometric identity verification. (Solid Intel)
